Notice And Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Apr-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Lourdes Borja, Judgment Debtor in Propria Persona

After hearing, The claim of exemption is granted from April 1, 2010 until November 1, 2010, at wich time judgment debtor, Lourdes Borja, shall pay $200.0 per month until judgment is satisfied. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment debtor. Judge: Monica Wiley, not reported.
